name: z-clean
description: AI coding runtime hygiene reports, zombie cleanup, and safe workspace cache cleanup

scripts.test: node --test test/patterns.test.js test/scanner-candidate-selection.test.js test/scanner-configured-candidates.test.js test/scanner-classification-diagnostics.test.js test/process-tree-enumeration.test.js test/process-tree-relations.test.js test/process-tree-parsing-diagnostics.test.js test/killer-batch.test.js test/killer-generation-identity.test.js test/killer-unix.test.js test/killer-windows.test.js test/killer-windows-query-failures.test.js test/config.test.js test/storage-concurrency.test.js test/diagnostic-safety.test.js test/installer-fallback.test.js test/scheduler-safety.test.js test/scheduler-destructive-boundaries.test.js test/hook-installer-cleanup.test.js test/hook-installer-filesystem-safety.test.js test/init-command.test.js test/install-experience.test.js test/reporter.test.js test/cli.test.js test/cli-history-protect.test.js test/cli-doctor-hooks.test.js test/cli-doctor-scheduler.test.js test/cli-doctor-output.test.js test/audit-summary.test.js test/audit-safety.test.js test/cache-discovery.test.js test/cache-root-boundary.test.js test/cache-cleanup-safety.test.js test/cache-cli.test.js
scripts.syntax: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const {execFileSync}=require('node:child_process');const files=['bin/zclean.js'];function walk(dir){if(!fs.existsSync(dir))return;for(const entry of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){const file=path.join(dir,entry.name);if(entry.isDirectory())walk(file);else if(entry.name.endsWith('.js'))files.push(file);}}for(const dir of ['src','test','scripts'])walk(dir);for(const file of files)execFileSync(process.execPath,['-c',file],{stdio:'inherit'});"

author: TheStack-ai
